'''The Warlord''' was a member of an [[The Warlord's species|unknown alien species]] from an unknown system who became a tyrant on the world of [[Kariek]] around [[28 BBY/Legends|28 BBY]]. He was defeated by the [[Empire of the Hand]] [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] during the [[Eickarie]]s [[Capture of the Warlord|uprising]] on Kariek in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]]. After his defeat by the 501st, the Empire of the Hand learned of the location of his home system from him, and sent a sizeable force to make contact.
